---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or workflow

What reviewer workflow is blocked or awkward today?

## Proposed change

Describe the improvement you want to see.

## Why it matters

How would this help educators, editors, researchers, or small institutions?

## Privacy considerations

Call out any effect on local-first behavior, exports, retention, or sensitive document handling.
